one_time_description: Insurance claim proceeds recognized as revenue in 2024
economic_notes: Member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (nine Nations). Portfolio investments include First Nations Bank, MLTC Resource Development Limited Partnership, MLTC Program Services Inc., White Buffalo Development Corp., and Accurate Industries Holdings Inc. Multiple large capital projects underway including water treatment plant ($9.7M budget), lagoon ($14.9M budget), subdivision ($10.5M budget), school remediation ($6.1M budget), and solid waste transfer station ($3.4M budget).
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for 2024 (prior year 2023 was a disclaimer of opinion). Qualification relates to insufficient audit evidence over travel expenses and assistance payments to members, completeness of accounts payable, and prior year expense eligibility under funding agreements. Province is Saskatchewan (Treaty 6 Territory). Consolidated entities include Ministikwan Lake Cree Nation, CMHC Housing Program, and Island Lake Development Corp. (inactive). ISC funding per reconciliation: confirmation amount $24,583,736 adjusted for prior/current year unearned funding to arrive at $28,261,885 recognized. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($28,261,885) + CMHC ($2,157,936) + Meadow Lake Health & Social Dev. Auth. ($3,276,920) + Meadow Lake Child & Family Services ($566,323) - note MLTC Program Services treated as flow-through. Operating deficit within accumulated surplus of ($10,354,799). Large capital expenditures of $18.8M in 2024. Asset retirement obligation of $1,028,252 for hazardous materials in buildings/housing.
